ead.archdesc:
======= RMA03381New York State College of Veterinary Medicine Office of Dean Robert D. Phemister records24-1-3381Compiled by Laura FinkelDivision of Rare and Manuscript Collections

converted from EAD 1.0 to EAD 2002 >>>>>>> 2e3ec5c57314077b8435567632a49d313357daab
English
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
New York State College of Veterinary Medicine Office of Dean Robert D. Phemister records
New York State College of Veterinary Medicine. Office of the Dean
Phemister, Robert D.
24-1-3381
5.0 cubic feet. 5.0 cubic feet.
1960-1997-(bulk 1983-1994) Subject files. Correspondence and subject files compiled by the Office of the Dean of the New York State College of Veterinary Medicine during Robert D. Phemister's tenure as dean. Collection material in English 5145720
General
Contact Information:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu
Compiled by:
Laura Finkel
Date completed:
September 2004
EAD encoding:
Laura Finkel, 2004
Date modified:
Jude Corina, February 2014
BIOGRAPHICAL NOTE
Robert D. Phemister was Dean of the New York State College of Veterinary Medicine from 1985-1995.
COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
Correspondence and subject files compiled by the Office of the Dean of the New York State College of Veterinary Medicine during Robert D. Phemister's tenure as dean.
COLLECTION ARRANGEMENT
In original order.
Cite As:
New York State College of Veterinary Medicine Office of the Dean records, #24-01-3381. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
Veterinary medicine -- Study and teaching. Phemister, Robert D. New York State College of Veterinary Medicine

Scope and Contents
Includes vintage stationary of Anton Dill & Son, Practical Horseshoer, given to Dean Phemister. Also a brochure, circa 1970, on the Tierärztliche Hochschule Hannover, (University of Veterinary Medicine Hanover)Print of Dr. James Law4Central Planning Committee (VMC)1987-199051Central Planning Committee (VMC)1987-199052Diagnostic Lab Renovation198953Diagnostic Lab Renovation198954Report for Accreditation by the American Association of Laboratory DiagnosticiansDec 12-13, 199155Facility Program1990s56"Facility Master Plan" by Davis, Brody,etc30 Aug 198557Facility Program and Secondary Teaching Center198958Accreditation - Self Evaluation Report198759Accreditation - Self Evaluation Report1987510Accreditation - Appendices - Self Evaluation Report1987511Accreditation - Professional Courses1987512Transgenic Animal Center1988-1990513College Executive Committee Retreat18 June 1987514Search Committee for New Dean1983515Annual Reports to the President1965-1990516Announcements, vol. 79, no. 5July 30, 1987517 ======= Deceased Emeriti199011Donald W.
